title: Autumn's Realistic Clouds
description: This is a resource pack that tries to make clouds look more realistic for the Protomanly's Weather Mod!
body:
# Autumn's Realistic Clouds Resource Pack for Protomanly's Weather Mod ⛈️

This is a resource pack made to make clouds for the Protomanly's Weather Mod more realistic.

## Overview Video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/u0W9e718KqM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## What's Changed? ✨
- Textures for the clouds are more messy and realistic
- Rain Fog is visually better from afar
- Tornadoes show strength visually better
- Hurricanes and Squall Lines look visually better

## Performance 📈
Performance isn't affected, it should have similiar performance to original PMW clouds.

## How can I report issues? 🚩
You can report issues by dming "autumn.kitty" on Discord!

## Suggestions? 💬
You can give me suggestions in the Protomanly Weather Mod Discord! I have my own thread in the PMW-Addons channel!
